rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or declared as helpers in the same annex.
Use only valid AADL feature names and declared auxiliary variables in AGREE contracts; avoid referencing undefined symbols.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, validate that all expressions have consistent types and that referenced identifiers are properly declared or visible.
In AGREE contracts, avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scopes; use assign for output bindings instead.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks and placed in appropriate component type or implementation scopes.
AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool; ensure type consistency in const and eq declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not reference undefined identifiers or use invalid scalar type names in AGREE contracts.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output feature bindings.
